description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a metallic silver back and a large, black glass touchscreen on the front. The back panel displays a prominent Apple logo in the center and dual camera lenses with a flash in the top left corner. The sides are thin and metallic, with visible buttons for volume and power, as well as a mute switch. The front is dominated by the display, with a circular home button at the bottom and a small speaker and front-facing camera at the top. The device is slim and compact, designed for handheld use, and its surfaces are smooth and reflective. The overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of high-end smartphones.
description: A slim, silver smartphone with a large black touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a central Apple logo. The device features a sleek, minimalist design with metallic sides and a smooth finish.
description_view_0: The back view shows a silver metallic surface with a centered Apple logo and dual cameras with a flash in the top left corner.
description_view_1: The left edge view reveals the device's thin profile, with visible volume buttons and a mute switch.
description_view_2: The front view displays the large black touchscreen, a circular home button at the bottom, and a small speaker and camera at the top.
description_view_3: The right edge view highlights the slimness of the phone and shows the power button.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, clearly visible and contrasting with the silver surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is completely black, indicating it is turned off or in sleep mode, with no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged horizontally in the top left corner on the back of the device, slightly raised from the surface.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on the left edge (volume up, volume down, mute switch) and on the right edge (power button). The front features a circular home button below the screen.
